canonical_definition: Based on the provided data, COPAL-ID is an Indonesian benchmark with two distinct stated applications. One paper defines its function as a tool to "assess downstream model performance after safety fine-tuning." In this context, it is used to evaluate models after a specific training stage. A separate study, however, uses COPAL-ID as a measurement instrument for the construct of Language proficiency. The benchmark is thus positioned in the surveyed literature to evaluate both model performance in a post-training context and a more general linguistic capability.
papers: Emergent morpho-phonological representations in self-supervised speech models
V-SEAM: Visual Semantic Editing and Attention Modulating for Causal Interpretability of Vision-Language Models
ViDoRAG: Visual Document Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Dynamic Iterative Reasoning Agents

definitions.text: An Indonesian benchmark used to assess downstream model performance after safety fine-tuning.
definitions.paper: ViDoRAG: Visual Document Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Dynamic Iterative Reasoning Agents
